description: CalorieCam is a nutrition-tracking mobile app that uses AI to estimate calories and macros from meal photos, voice, or text and provides coaching features. It also offers partner and coach products that share members' nutrition and activity data with gyms, coaches, and integrated platforms.
summary: caloriecam.ai exposes one documented partner HTTP API at `https://api.caloriecam.ai/v1`, with docs on `/developers`; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
